response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with roughly 18 years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, test automation training, and recent AI/dev-tooling work), plus some mobile exposure through iOS/Apple TV development. However, this is a Level II people-management role, and the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience — no direct reports, performance management, or organizational-change leadership. The core management requirements (2+ years people management, 3+ years technical leadership) are not evidenced, making the fit weak despite the solid technical alignment with engineering productivity.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure background (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium courses, CI/CD setup)
18+ years of broad software development experience well above the 8-year minimum
Some mobile-platform experience (iOS and Apple TV apps, mobile device orchestration tooling)
concerns: No demonstrated people-management experience (one-on-ones, performance reviews, direct reports)
No formal technical leadership role such as tech lead or team lead in employment history
Career trajectory is consistently IC-focused, suggesting a possible mismatch with a management-track role

key_factors.factor: No formal technical leadership track record
